lessons.title: Making Decisions (If) 🚦
lessons.description: Learn to run code only when certain conditions are met using if statements.

lessons.title: The Unless Statement 🚫
lessons.description: A Ruby-specific feature that makes negative conditions read like English.

lessons.title: Logical Operators 🔗
lessons.description: Combine multiple conditions using AND, OR, and NOT.

lessons.title: Case Statements 🗄️
lessons.description: Write cleaner code when you have many different conditions to check.
